source: before-opti PageSpeed JSON plus static code mapping

exactOptimizationChange: Reduce shared client-side layout work, keep analytics/performance observers gated, and avoid hydrating shared UI on pages that do not need it.
Do not load the full Squaredle dictionary on mount; defer it until the user loads today or clicks solve, and prefer compressed static delivery.
pages.expectedImpact: Should directly improve this page toward the 90+ mobile and desktop target.
testsRequired: Re-run PSI mobile and desktop for /squaredle-solver

exactOptimizationChange: Reduce shared client-side layout work, keep analytics/performance observers gated, and avoid hydrating shared UI on pages that do not need it.
Lazy-load solver datasets/WASM after first paint or user interaction, and avoid calculating starting suggestions during initial page load.
pages.expectedImpact: Should directly improve this page toward the 90+ mobile and desktop target.
testsRequired: Re-run PSI mobile and desktop for /3-letter-wordle-solver

exactOptimizationChange: Keep content routes CSR-free, shrink shared content CSS, and avoid adding client-only components to answer/article pages.
pages.expectedImpact: Should directly improve this page toward the 90+ mobile and desktop target.

codeAreas.name: Content layout without client JS
codeAreas.recommendedFix: Keep content routes CSR-free, shrink shared content CSS, and avoid adding client-only components to answer/article pages.

codeAreas.name: Archive and static dataset pages
codeAreas.recommendedFix: Keep archive landing content light and lazy-load large history datasets only when a specific archive is opened or searched.

codeAreas.name: Shared interactive layout and hydration
codeAreas.recommendedFix: Reduce shared client-side layout work, keep analytics/performance observers gated, and avoid hydrating shared UI on pages that do not need it.

codeAreas.name: Wordlebot WASM solver pages
codeAreas.recommendedFix: Lazy-load solver datasets/WASM after first paint or user interaction, and avoid calculating starting suggestions during initial page load.

codeAreas.name: Spotle dataset pages
codeAreas.recommendedFix: Avoid bundling Spotle data into page JS/HTML; fetch the JSON lazily and cache it with stable static headers.

codeAreas.name: Squaredle dictionary loading
codeAreas.recommendedFix: Do not load the full Squaredle dictionary on mount; defer it until the user loads today or clicks solve, and prefer compressed static delivery.

codeAreas.name: Wordle analyzer worker data
codeAreas.recommendedFix: Start analyzer worker and fetch analyzer datasets only when the user begins analysis, not during initial render.
